metadata.title: SEALSQ / WISeKey global build-out - multi-country government-subsidized PQC/quantum/space/crypto footprint (the narrative-stack matures into a real-estate map)
metadata.extends: macro-pqc-chips.json (the microcap-narrative-stack thesis). This block maps the GLOBAL FACILITIES, subsidiaries, JVs and strategic investments SEALSQ/WISeKey added across CH/FR/ES/US/IN, the WISeSat/SpaceX rideshare relationship, the SEALCOIN->Hedera bridge, and the 'and others' PQC peers - then re-grades the likelihood now that there is a subsidized footprint, not just press releases.
metadata.provenance: Web-verified 2026-06-07 (sealsq.com/wisekey.com investor releases, GlobeNewswire, StockTitan, TheQuantumInsider, QuantumComputingReport, Hashgraph Association, SEC 6-K, PitchBook/Crunchbase). VENDOR PRESS DOMINATES the source set (most items are SEALSQ/WISeKey self-issued) - treated as announcements/intentions, not independently audited outcomes. Microcap promotional bias flagged throughout.
cross_refs: macro-pqc-chips.json (parent thesis: speculative PQC microcap vs incumbents Infineon/NXP/STMicro/Thales)
fin-spacex-spcx.json (SpaceX is the rideshare LAUNCH CUSTOMER here too - not a strategic partner/investor)
fin-hedera-connections.json (TASK #2 - SEALCOIN is built on Hedera w/ Hashgraph Association investment; this is the bridge edge)
macro-quantum-computing.json (IonQ/RGTI/QBTS - the same real-vs-narrative quantum split)
digitalid-corporate.json + digitalid-regulatory.json (WISeID / WISe.ART / PKI = the digital-identity leg reappearing)
altcoin-lens.json (SEALCOIN/QAIT = a quantum+space-stacked token, same narrative-beta pattern)

financials_2025.ticker: LAES (SEALSQ Corp); parent WKEY (WISeKey International Holding)
financials_2025.interpretation: Cash hoard (~$417.7M reported end-2025) is ~23x annual revenue and dwarfs operations - it is DILUTION-/treasury-FUNDED (heavy equity issuance + a quantum/crypto 'treasury' strategy through the 2024-26 quantum mania), NOT operating cash flow. The company is buying a footprint and a portfolio of stakes with raised capital while losing ~$34M/yr on ~$18M of revenue. Real optionality, raised-not-earned. IC'ALPS contributed only ~$3.5M revenue post-acquisition.

global_footprint.site: Geneva HQ (relocating to Pont-Rouge, Aug 2026) + Geneva Quantum Center of Excellence
global_footprint.role: Group HQ / coordination + governance nucleus of the 'Quantum Corridor'; hosts WISeID (PKI/digital-identity), WeCan Group (Swiss blockchain, KYO 'Know Your Object'), SEALCOIN AG, WISe.ART AG.
global_footprint.govt_tie: Geneva positioning as 'global reference for quantum'; canton/federal deep-tech branding.

global_footprint.site: Aix-en-Provence (SEALSQ operational HQ) + IC'ALPS (Grenoble, ASIC design house, acquired Aug 2025)
global_footprint.role: Post-quantum semiconductor + identity-microchip development; IC'ALPS = custom ASIC (medical/industrial/aerospace-grade; partner of Intel Foundry/TSMC/GlobalFoundries) pivoting to Quantum ASIC. LOI to acquire Miraex (photonics/quantum sensing).
global_footprint.govt_tie: European Chips Act alignment; French deep-tech ecosystem.

global_footprint.site: Murcia Quantum Edge Hub (EUR40M) + La Linea (LLG4IR.com) + Malaga TechPark
global_footprint.role: Spain's first R&D + industrialization center for post-quantum chip design, secure microcontrollers, TPMs; also a separate ~$12M SEALSQ/WISeKey Post-Quantum Semiconductor Personalization & Test Center in Murcia.
global_footprint.govt_tie: EUR20M from Spanish government (SETT.ES program) + EUR20M private incl. EUR10M from SEALSQ/WISeKey via QuantixEdges.com. State co-financed.

global_footprint.site: SEALSQ USA (Arizona) + 'Quantum Made in USA' strategy
global_footprint.role: US base; vehicle for onshore quantum stakes - EeroQ (electrons-on-helium quantum chips; SEALSQ is lead investor in its financing round), ColibriTD (quantum-as-a-service, wafer-yield optimization). SEALQUANTUM.com = up-to-$35M quantum-startup investment program.
global_footprint.govt_tie: 'Quantum Made in USA' / onshoring narrative aligned to US CHIPS + national-security PQC mandates (CNSA 2.0).

global_footprint.site: SEALKAYNESQ Ltd JV (Sanand, Gujarat) - inside Kaynes SemiCon's OSAT plant
global_footprint.role: India's first Common Criteria-compliant wafer/final test + onshore PKI/PQC personalization center. SEALSQ 51% / Kaynes SemiCon 49%, 5-member board. Commercial production H2-2026 after early-2026 certification.
global_footprint.govt_tie: MoU with Government of Gujarat for a 300-million-unit/year post-quantum semiconductor center; serves India's national-security localization rules; rides India Semiconductor Mission incentives.

WISeSat.role: LEO picosat constellation carrying QS7001 secure elements; launched its 21st satellite Mar 30 2026 on SpaceX Falcon 9 Transporter-16 (Vandenberg); target 100-satellite quantum-comms constellation by 2033. Recast as 'WISeSat.Space' quantum-secure space unit; announced commercial Quantum Spatial Orbital Cloud (QSOC).
WISeSat.spacex_relationship: RIDESHARE LAUNCH CUSTOMER on SpaceX Transporter missions - NOT a strategic partnership, investment, or equity tie by SpaceX. Same correct framing as macro-pqc-chips.json and fin-spacex-spcx.json (SpaceX's real partners are Google/Anthropic via cancelable compute, not WISeSat).

SEALCOIN.role: SEALCOIN AG (Swiss DePIN entity) - machine-to-machine economy infra: IoT devices autonomously negotiate/settle, secured by PQC; native token QAIT; 'Spacedrop' onboarding launched Apr 2026 (17,500 wallets in first week). BUILT ON HEDERA (HTS/HCS/HSCS) with strategic investment + technical support from The Hashgraph Association (Swiss non-profit promoting Hedera). WISe.ART AG (NFT/authenticated-assets subsidiary) ALSO took a Hashgraph Association investment.
SEALCOIN.bridge_note: THIS IS THE BRIDGE TO TASK #2 (Hedera connection map): WISeKey/SEALSQ's crypto leg runs on Hedera, funded by the Hashgraph Association. Adds the WISeKey cluster to the Hedera council/ecosystem overlay.

pqc_peers_and_others.name: Infineon / NXP / STMicroelectronics / Thales
pqc_peers_and_others.note: Already mapped in macro-pqc-chips.json. CC-certified ML-KEM/ML-DSA silicon, real market share. The wall SEALSQ must climb.

pqc_peers_and_others.name: PQShield
pqc_peers_and_others.note: ~$65.3M raised over 8 rounds ($20M Series A; $37M Series B Jun 2024 led by Addition, + Chevron TV, Legal & General). Customers: AMD, Microchip, Collins Aerospace, Lattice Semiconductor, Sumitomo Electric, NTT Data, Toyota/Denso (Mirise). Venture-funded (not dilution-via-public-microcap), embedded with real silicon vendors - a more credible 'pure-play' than SEALSQ on customer depth.

pqc_peers_and_others.name: Crypto Quantique
pqc_peers_and_others.note: Quantum-tunneling-based device-level entropy/root-of-trust for IoT; investors incl. Intel Ignite, EIC, BGF, Parkwalk. Private, technical, niche.

edges.notes: Acquired French ASIC design house IC'ALPS (Grenoble; partner of Intel Foundry/TSMC/GlobalFoundries). ~$3.5M revenue contribution. Vertical-integration into custom silicon. The French node of the Quantum Corridor.
Letter of intent to acquire Miraex (Swiss photonics/quantum-sensing). LOI = non-binding; treat as intention.
Multiple rounds into EeroQ (US electrons-on-helium quantum-chip startup); SEALSQ to lead its next round. The 'Quantum Made in USA' anchor stake.
Via SEALQUANTUM.com (up-to-$35M quantum-startup program); quantum-as-a-service / wafer-yield. One of two finalized SEALQUANTUM investments.
SEALKAYNESQ Ltd (SEALSQ 51% / Kaynes 49%); India's first CC-compliant test + PKI/PQC personalization, Sanand Gujarat OSAT. Commercial production H2-2026.
State MoU for a 300M-unit/yr PQC semiconductor center; India Semiconductor Mission alignment. STATE-as-anchor (like MP Materials/Centrus pattern in defense-rare-earth).
EUR20M Spanish-government co-finance (SETT.ES) of the EUR40M Murcia Quantum Edge Hub; SEALSQ/WISeKey put in EUR10M via QuantixEdges. European Chips Act framing.
Investment in Swiss blockchain firm WeCan to embed its KYO ('Know Your Object') into SEALSQ chips - IoT object identity on-chain. The Swiss blockchain node.
Strategic investment + technical support; SEALCOIN built on Hedera (HTS/HCS/HSCS). BRIDGE EDGE into the Hedera ecosystem -> fin-hedera-connections.json (Task #2).
Second Hashgraph Association investment into the WISeKey cluster (WISe.ART = authenticated digital assets/NFT). Reinforces the WISeKey<->Hedera tie.

WISeSat buys rideshare slots on SpaceX Falcon 9 Transporter missions (21st sat, Transporter-16, Mar 30 2026, Vandenberg). CUSTOMER relationship ONLY - explicitly NOT a SpaceX strategic partnership/investment. Prevents over-stating the SpaceX link.

edges.raw_instrument: SEALKAYNESQ is the SEALSQ + Kaynes Semicon post-quantum semiconductor JV (India) - SEALSQ is a JV parent
edges.notes: corporate structure: JV/subsidiary link to parent SEALSQ

edges.raw_instrument: Kaynes Semicon is the other parent of the SEALKAYNESQ PQC-semiconductor JV
edges.notes: corporate structure: JV/subsidiary link to parent SEALSQ

edges.raw_instrument: SEALSQ_Murcia_Hub is SEALSQ's Murcia (Spain) chip/PQC hub - a SEALSQ site
edges.notes: corporate structure: JV/subsidiary link to parent SEALSQ

edges.raw_instrument: SEALCOIN is SEALSQ's IoT/DePIN token initiative (built on Hedera) - a SEALSQ venture
edges.notes: corporate structure: JV/subsidiary link to parent SEALSQ

assessment: RE-GRADE vs macro-pqc-chips.json: the SEALSQ/WISeKey story has matured from pure press-release velocity into a REAL, multi-country, government-co-financed FOOTPRINT - Switzerland (Geneva HQ + Quantum Center), France (Aix-en-Provence + IC'ALPS Grenoble), Spain (Murcia hub, EUR20M state money), USA (Arizona + EeroQ/ColibriTD stakes), India (SEALKAYNESQ JV + Gujarat 300M-unit MoU). That state-anchoring (Gujarat ISM, Spanish SETT.ES, EU Chips Act, US 'Quantum Made in USA') is the same 'state-as-customer/sponsor' pattern that makes MP Materials/Centrus (defense-rare-earth) and IonQ (macro-quantum-computing) more durable than pure narrative-beta. HOWEVER the core caution STANDS and arguably sharpens: (1) the ~$417.7M cash hoard is DILUTION-/treasury-RAISED, not earned (net loss ~$34M on ~$18M revenue); the footprint is being BOUGHT with shareholder capital. (2) The narrative stack has grown from THREE to ~FIVE (quantum + space + crypto + sovereign-semiconductor-subsidy + digital-identity/PKI) - more stories, same microcap. (3) Most sources are vendor self-issued (MoUs, LOIs, 'centers of excellence', QSOC) = intentions, not certified output or revenue. (4) Real PQC silicon remains incumbent-led (Infineon/NXP/STMicro/Thales certified; PQShield embedded with AMD/Microchip/Toyota on customer depth SEALSQ lacks). LIKELIHOOD OF BECOMING A MAJOR PQC-CHIP/QUANTUM PRINCIPAL: still LOW-MODERATE - the government JVs (esp. India) are a genuine, gradeable hedge, but execution/certification/revenue must follow the announcements. The SpaceX tie is rideshare-only (do NOT inflate it). The SEALCOIN->Hedera/Hashgraph Association bridge pulls WISeKey into the Hedera ecosystem overlay (Task #2) and the digital-identity thread (WISeID/WISe.ART/WeCan). Classification unchanged: bubble-adjacent quantum/PQC sub-vehicle - now with a state-subsidized real-asset skeleton under the narrative - tangential to the AI circular core (not in the SCC).
